jobDescription: KRY is Europe’s leading digital healthcare company backed by top tier investors ( Accel, Index Ventures, Creandum, Project A). Join us in our mission to build better and more accessible healthcare. We are using technology to digitise healthcare and provide a service that gives the patient the best possible healthcare experience, regardless of location. Our headquarters are located in Stockholm and we’re expanding internationally, with local products already live in Sweden, UK, France and Norway. Running up to a launch in Germany, we are looking for a witty, driven and entrepreneurial mind to help us gain traction in the German market. You will play a pivotal role in KRY becoming Germany’s leading digital healthcare provider and building up the Operations side of our business. This is a role for you who has excellent communication and persuasion skills, whilst also enjoying meeting new people and building trusting relationships. Starting date: September 2019 What you’ll do Report directly to the Operations Manager and become a core member of the German KRY Operations team with a perspective of leading a small team in the future Be first point of contact for KRY-doctors and support them on a daily basis Recruit and retain highly skilled and motivated doctors Ensure shift-scheduling works smoothly while constantly improving processes Build KPI framework to measure and monitor success Design training package to develop doctors’ skills (with Medical Director) Create positive and active community of KRY-doctors What you'll bring1-3 years professional experience in a service-oriented role, e.g. Recruiting, Account Management, Sales Excellent written and verbal communication skills in German and English Great self-organisation and independent project management Strong persuasion skills and comfort in interactions with senior counterparts Drive and enthusiasm to find fast and creative solutions Joy of working in a fast-paced environment towards clear goals You are patient, can listen actively and communicate effectively Stimulated by working with digital tools and administration Able to work under pressure and prioritise whilst delivering quality work Understanding of the healthcare sector is a plus What's in it for you We offer a unique opportunity to gain a broad and deep understanding of the inner workings at Europe’s leading digital healthcare company. We value grit and a can-do attitude; there is a challenging journey ahead of us. You are brave enough to set lofty goals and then work passionately to achieve them. Last, but not least, you believe that by working together we will achieve greater things than by working alone. At KRY we care about each other and the world around us. Expect to work hard, have fun and learn new things every day. This is your chance to work for a meaningful company that encourages personal development and celebrates diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, or marital status. Our office is located in Berlin- Mitte and, among other benefits, we offer a great deal on the Europe-wide Urban Sports Club membership.
